name_en: Another hot BV Bottega Veneta lunch box bag for this year 🔥. The entire body is made of top-tier Nappa lambskin, very soft and lightweight. It also features the Intrecciato weaving technique, developed by the two founders over several months since the brand's inception. Completely hand-woven by Italian artisans, perfectly embodying Bottega's artisanal spirit. The bag shape is a practical and popular lunch box style, and the slightly curved opening fits the wrist better. Model: 754443, Dimensions: 22*13*9
